title: monarda lasiodonta
side_effects: Monarda lasiodonta can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate. Ingesting large amounts of the plant's leaves or flowers can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to the presence of monoterpenes and flavonoids. Additionally, the plant's essential oils may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure, diabetes, or epilepsy. Improper use of Monarda lasiodonta can also lead to respiratory issues, such as bronchitis or asthma attacks, particularly in individuals with pre-existing conditions.
